bulle.dev: I studied web development for three years.
random: I am studying at a university institute of technology. (BUT MMI)
I took the audiovisual option in high school.
I passed my high school diploma with specializations in Computer Science and English.
I kinda love the sea, can you tell ?

projets.titre: Mascot for the APMEP national day 2025
projets.description: Design of a character entirely from mathematical symbols in Clip Studio Paint. This character is intended to illustrate the booklet for National Mathematics Day 2025 in Toulon.
Creation of the communication strategy and production of a music video for one of the songs by a local band.
Creation of a comic strip for the Crous competition, consisting of three pages on the four of courage. Created using felt-tip pens.

competences.description: As part of my MMI studies, I was able to acquire knowledge in back-end development by creating interfaces using SQL databases, mainly in PHP. I also had the opportunity to learn frameworks and the Python language.

As part of my MMI studies, I gained knowledge in front-end development by creating responsive and user-friendly applications using HTML and CSS, as well as JavaScript interactions. I also learned how to use frameworks and libraries for this purpose.
In order to do my job as well as possible, I have learned to use the tools at my disposal to maximize my efficiency in development, whether for team development or hosting.

Thanks to my interest in art and the diversity of my studies in MMi, I have been able to develop solid skills in graphic design, whether for logo design or visual creation, as well as the ability to produce a video clip or create a functional model.

With my coding skills, I have gained expertise in promoting my achievements, whether for SEO, tracking, or marketing. I also have skills in using CMSs such as WordPress and in automating tasks with Make.
I was able to carry out numerous group projects, sometimes with real clients, which allowed me to acquire skills in project management, law, and the ability to work in a team within an organization.

projets.description: Web development internship at Papiers de Paris, a luxury wallpaper company. I improved the company's website by making it more user-friendly and improving purchase tracking with Google Tag Manager.
Creation of a CMS enabling the publication of articles, their rating, theme modification, and user account management with React and Symfony.
Creation of a fictional company whose employees have superpowers: development of a WordPress website, communication strategy, logo, photo shoot, and promotional video.
